rules.calendar: non-trading days do not participate in streaks
rules.confirmation: third consecutive eligible valid raw-true trading row is first confirmed; no backfill
rules.d: selected d=2 confirmed trading days; qualification occurs on the second confirmed day
rules.g: selected g=1 cumulative eligible valid raw-false gap days after a qualified component
rules.hard_break: unknown, blocked, diagnostic, ineligible, missing and missing expected rows reset or close the run
rules.preconfirmation_raw_true: does not increment or reset g and is not a raw-false bridge
rules.raw_false_gap: g+1 raw-false gap day is visible and causes irreversible finalization
rules.right_censor: open intervals are right-censored without fabricated finalization
rules.unqualified_reentry: an unqualified confirmed reentry blocks merge and is not swallowed as a false gap
